name: Revithia
method: Wash the chickpeas and remove the soaked water when prepared to
make this Greek chickpea pasta dish.
Wash the chickpeas thoroughly in a colander that has plenty of water.
Fill a wide pan halfway with cold water to cover the revithia.
Increase the heat to high and bring to a boil.
Wipe the chickpeas, then return them to the bowl with enough hot
Reduce the heat to low heat and cover the pot.
Enable the revithia to cook for 1-2 hours, based on the size of the
Sprinkle with salt as you slowly pour the combination into the pan
Mix the soup slowly for 2-3 minutes or until it softens.
